segments.text: If there be therefore any consolation in Christ, if any comfort of love, if any fellowship of the Spirit, if any bowels and mercies,
Fulfil ye my joy, that ye be likeminded, having the same love, being of one accord, of one mind.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Let nothing be done through strife or vainglory; but in lowliness of mind let each esteem other better than themselves.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Look not every man on his own things, but every man also on the things of others.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Let this mind be in you, which was also in Christ Jesus:
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Who, being in the form of God,
thought it not robbery to be equal with God:
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But made himself of no reputation,
and took upon him the form of a servant, and was made in the likeness of men:
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And being found in fashion as a man,
he humbled himself, and became obedient unto death, even the death of the cross.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Wherefore God also hath highly exalted him, and given him a name which is above every name:
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: That at the name of Jesus every knee should bow, of things in heaven, and things in earth, and things under the earth;
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: And that every tongue should confess that Jesus Christ is Lord, to the glory of God the Father.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Wherefore, my beloved, as ye have always obeyed, not as in my presence only, but now much more in my absence, work out your own salvation with fear and trembling.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: For it is God which worketh in you both to will and to do of his good pleasure.
Do all things without murmurings and disputings:
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: That ye may be blameless and harmless, the sons of God, without rebuke, in the midst of a crooked and perverse nation, among whom ye shine as lights in the world;
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Holding forth the word of life; that I may rejoice in the day of Christ, that I have not run in vain, neither laboured in vain.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Yea, and if I be offered upon the sacrifice and service of your faith, I joy, and rejoice with you all.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: For the same cause also do ye joy, and rejoice with me.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: But I trust in the Lord Jesus to send Timotheus shortly unto you, that I also may be of good comfort, when I know your state.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: For I have no man likeminded, who will naturally care for your state.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: For all seek their own, not the things which are Jesus Christ's.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: But ye know the proof of him, that, as a son with the father, he hath served with me in the gospel.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Him therefore I hope to send presently, so soon as I shall see how it will go with me.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: But I trust in the Lord that I also myself shall come shortly.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Yet I supposed it necessary to send to you Epaphroditus, my brother, and companion in labour, and fellowsoldier, but your messenger, and he that ministered to my wants.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: For he longed after you all, and was full of heaviness, because that ye had heard that he had been sick.
For indeed he was sick nigh unto death: but God had mercy on him; and not on him only, but on me also, lest I should have sorrow upon sorrow.
I sent him therefore the more carefully, that, when ye see him again, ye may rejoice, and that I may be the less sorrowful.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Receive him therefore in the Lord with all gladness; and hold such in reputation:
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Because for the work of Christ he was nigh unto death, not regarding his life, to supply your lack of service toward me.
segments.speaker: Paul
